name: Search X in sorted array
statement: Given a sorted array of integers nums with 0-based indexing, find the index of a specified target integer. If the target is found in the array, return its index. If the target is not found, return -1.
constraints:
•   1 <= nums.length <= 105
  •   -105 < nums[i], target < 105
  •   nums is sorted in ascending order.

examples.explanation: The target integer 9 exists in nums and its index is 4
The target integer 2 does not exist in nums so return -1
